No dead cell has exactly 3 neighbors → no births.
Expected: nextGeneration([[0,0],[1,0],[0,1],[1,1]]) equals [[0,0],[1,0],[0,1],[1,1]] (same set).

Use sorted string comparison like the existing tests, or use toEqual with sorted arrays.

The implementation already handles this correctly, so the test will likely pass immediately.
